description: Query quota and usage statistics for Coding Plan services (GLM, Kimi, and more)
viewsContainer.title: Coding Plan Usage
views.usageStats.name: Usage Statistics
command.refresh.title: Coding Plan Usage: Refresh Usage Statistics
command.refresh.description: Refresh current coding plan usage and quota information
command.setToken.title: Coding Plan Usage: Set API Key
command.setToken.description: Securely set your API Key using encrypted storage (never written to files)
configuration.title: Coding Plan Usage
configuration.authToken.description: Authentication token for the selected coding plan platform
configuration.authToken.deprecated: Token is now stored securely via SecretStorage. Use the "Coding Plan Usage: Set API Key" command instead.
configuration.platform.description: Coding plan platform. The base URL defaults to this platform's address; set baseUrl only to override (e.g. a custom proxy).
configuration.baseUrl.description: Optional. API endpoint override; defaults to the selected platform's address. Only set this for a custom/proxy endpoint. Examples: GLM → `https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/anthropic`, Kimi → `https://api.moonshot.cn/v1`.
configuration.autoRefresh.description: Automatically refresh usage statistics on startup
configuration.refreshInterval.descriptio: Auto-refresh interval in seconds, minimum 60 (0 to disable)
configuration.afkThreshold.description: AFK threshold in seconds, set to 0 to disable, must be greater than refresh interval to take effect. Auto-refresh is paused during AFK.
configuration.enableRetry.description: Automatically retry on request failure (up to 3 retries for network errors, timeouts, and server errors)
configuration.resetNotification.descript: Show notification when quota resets (5-hour or weekly)
configuration.showQuotaRate.description: Show quota consumption chart in the sidebar
